Introduction
    Japan is celebrating the upcoming World Sports Games in Tokyo. The world's first vacuum-tube super-conducting linear train is built with the latest Japanese technology and timed to coincide with the WSG opening ceremonies.

Also known as: Thám Tử Lừng Danh Conan: Viên Đạn Đỏ
